subject: Job Opportunity – Senior Python Developer
body: Hi, we came across your profile and would like to invite you for an interview for a Senior Python Developer position at TechCorp. The role is remote-friendly with a competitive salary. Please let us know your availability this week.

subject: Q2 Planning Meeting – Tomorrow 3 PM
body: Hi team, just a reminder that our Q2 planning meeting is scheduled for tomorrow at 3 PM in Conference Room B (and on Zoom). Please come prepared with your quarterly updates and any blockers you want to discuss.

subject: Dev Digest Weekly – AI Tools, Python 3.14 & More
body: This week in tech: Python 3.14 ships with a new free-threaded mode, GitHub Copilot gets context awareness upgrades, and a roundup of the best open-source AI tools released in April. Click to read more.

subject: Project Alpha – Urgent: Deadline Update
body: Hi, the client has moved Project Alpha's delivery date up by two weeks. We now need the API integration delivered by May 15th instead of May 29th. Please confirm receipt and let me know if this is feasible with your current schedule.

subject: [GitHub] Your pull request was merged
body: Your pull request #42 'Add async email processing pipeline' in repo email-assist was successfully merged into main by reviewer johndoe. Thank you for your contribution!

subject: 🔥 Flash Sale – Up to 60% off Tech Accessories
body: Don't miss our 24-hour flash sale! Get up to 60% off on laptops, headphones, keyboards, and more. Sale ends tonight at midnight. Use code TECH60 at checkout.
